아가 2:1.content: I am a rose of Sharon, a lily of the valleys.

아가 2:2.content: As a lily among thorns, so is my love among the daughters.

아가 2:3.content: As the apple tree among the trees of the wood, so is my beloved among the sons. I sat down under his shadow with great delight, his fruit was sweet to my taste.

아가 2:4.content: He brought me to the banquet hall. His banner over me is love.

아가 2:5.content: Strengthen me with raisins, refresh me with apples; for I am faint with love.

아가 2:6.content: His left hand is under my head. His right hand embraces me.

아가 2:7.content: I adjure you, daughters of Jerusalem, by the roes, or by the hinds of the field, that you not stir up, nor awaken love, until it so desires.

아가 2:8.content: The voice of my beloved! Behold, he comes, leaping on the mountains, skipping on the hills.

아가 2:9.content: My beloved is like a roe or a young deer. Behold, he stands behind our wall! He looks in at the windows. He glances through the lattice.

아가 2:10.content: My beloved spoke, and said to me, “Rise up, my love, my beautiful one, and come away.

아가 2:11.content: For behold, the winter is past. The rain is over and gone.

아가 2:12.content: The flowers appear on the earth. The time of the singing has come, and the voice of the turtledove is heard in our land.

아가 2:13.content: The fig tree ripens her green figs. The vines are in blossom. They give out their fragrance. Arise, my love, my beautiful one, and come away.”

아가 2:14.content: My dove in the clefts of the rock, in the hiding places of the mountainside, let me see your face. let me hear your voice; for your voice is sweet and your face is lovely.

아가 2:15.content: Catch for us the foxes, the little foxes that plunder the vineyards; for our vineyards are in blossom.

아가 2:16.content: My beloved is mine, and I am his. He browses among the lilies.

아가 2:17.content: Until the day is cool, and the shadows flee away, turn, my beloved, and be like a roe or a young deer on the mountains of Bether.
